slate_grade_note: Four WC group-stage games; juice ceiling eliminates Argentina/Germany MLs but leaves three high-confidence edge plays at fair prices.

official_plays.edge_summary: Argentina's Messi-led attack generates world-class volume; Ecuador's CONMEBOL-tested pace on the counter creates legitimate threat against Argentina's high line at +120 — this is underpriced. The 2022 Saudi opener proves Argentina's defense is not invincible in tournament openers.
key_factors: Argentina creates top xG volume with Messi, Martinez, Fernandez
Ecuador scored in 7 of last 10 competitive games in CONMEBOL
+120 positive money — only needs a ~48% hit rate to be profitable long-term
Argentina has conceded in at least one group stage game in every recent WC
official_plays.main_risk: Argentina scores early and parks the bus, killing Ecuador's attacking urgency.

official_plays.edge_summary: Morocco's 2022 World Cup defense averaged 0.8 goals conceded per group game — their shape directly suppresses this type of contest. Croatia's aging core (Modric 40, Kovacic 32) without Perisic trends conservative; neither side will overcommit in a must-not-lose opener.
key_factors: Morocco averaged 1.0 total goals/game across 2022 group stage
Croatia missing Perisic (retired) — removed primary wide threat
Both managers prioritize defensive solidity in tournament openers
World Cup group-stage openers historically skew Under at ~57% rate
official_plays.main_risk: Early red card or VAR penalty forces both teams into open play, increasing goal likelihood.

official_plays.edge_summary: Vietnam's first-ever World Cup appearance vs a host nation in front of 80,000. USA's superior fitness and depth creates compounding goals as Vietnam's compact block deteriorates post-60 minutes. Goal-difference incentive pushes USA to keep pressing even with a comfortable lead.
key_factors: FIFA ranking gap: USA top-20 vs Vietnam outside top-90
Host nation crowd worth ~0.3-0.5 xG per game in knockout-style settings
Vietnam's 4-4-2 compact shape fatigue rate is significant without substitution depth
USA has goal-difference incentive — group competition rewards large margins
official_plays.main_risk: USA scores 2 early, rests starters for the Mexico match, total stalls at 2 or 3.

leans.note: Exactly at the juice ceiling — 1u only. Germany's pressing system generated 5 goals vs Scotland in Euro 2024 opener. Pattern is reliable but price leaves no cushion.

quick_reads: The -130 juice ceiling eliminates the obvious favorites (Argentina -175, Germany -190, USA -350 ML) — but BTTS and totals markets at these prices ARE where the edge lives.
USA/Vietnam Over 3.5 at -115 is the highest-conviction play on the card: largest quality gap on today's slate at the most favorable price.
Morocco's 2022 defensive data maps directly onto today — Under 2.5 is the most historically grounded line of the three official plays.
pass_notes: Argentina ML (-175): Best team on the slate but juice requires ~64% win rate to break even — no long-term value.
Germany ML (-190): Same ceiling violation. Monitor Germany/Scotland Over lean instead.
USA ML (-350): Never take -350 on any bet. The juice kills any edge.
Morocco/Croatia BTTS No (-175): Exceeds -130 hard ceiling — automatic pass.
First-goalscorer props across all games: excluded per WC soccer addendum — 90-minute format variance too high.

running_record.summary: No record data supplied. Recap cannot be finalized.
